comment: dead, steady, death - мертвый, устойчивый, смерть
mnemonic: death [де(фс)] смерть - Божья (дес-ница) от смерти спасёт.

examples.eng: He bores me to death.
He died a violent death.
It'll be the death of me.
Smoking is the death for him.
Death to tyrants!
He was battered to death.
The animal died a painful death.
Do you believe in life after death?
examples.ru: Верите ли вы в жизнь после смерти?

examples.eng: His death was very sudden.
His friend was close to death.
examples.ru: Его друг был близок к смерти.

examples.eng: The wages of sin is death.
Tragically, she bled to death.
examples.ru: К сожалению, она умерла от потери крови.

examples.eng: His mother's death was a cruel blow.
examples.ru: Смерть матери стала для него тяжёлым ударом.

examples.eng: Her death was sudden.
a death in the family
I was half sweltered to death.
examples.ru: Я чуть не умер от жары.

examples.eng: War implies fighting and death.
The climber dropped to his death.
He had two deaths on his conscience
examples.ru: На его совести было две смерти.

examples.eng: His death was a cruel blow.
His death was a tragic affair.
the death of a marriage
the passage from life to death
Motherlike I moan their death.
examples.ru: Как мать, я оплакиваю их смерть.

examples.eng: He worked them nearly to death.
examples.ru: Он заставлял их работать до полного изнеможения.

examples.eng: Joan of Arc was burnt to death.
The death toll has risen to 83.
examples.ru: Число погибших увеличилось до восьмидесяти трёх.

examples.eng: God interposed death.
We feared he was near death.
examples.ru: Мы боялись, что он скоро умрёт.

examples.eng: He suffered a horrible death.
